truth: What's the silliest thing you've ever done to make a friend laugh?
If you could have any animal as a pet, what would you pick and why?
What's your favorite thing about school?
What's the funniest dream you remember having?
If you were a superhero, what would your power be?
What's the most embarrassing thing that's happened to you at school?
What's your favorite food that most people think is weird?
Who is the funniest person you know?
What's a rule you wish your parents didn't have?
What's the best gift you've ever received?
dare: Do your best impression of a chicken for 20 seconds.
Talk in a robot voice until your next turn.
Try to lick your elbow.
Do 10 jumping jacks while singing your favorite song.
Balance a spoon on your nose for 15 seconds.
Make up a silly handshake and teach it to the group.
Do your best dinosaur roar and walk.
Draw a moustache on your finger and wear it for two rounds.
Speak in rhymes for the next two turns.
Do a cartwheel or your best attempt at one.

truth: What's the most embarrassing thing in your search history this week?
Who was your first crush and what happened?
What's a lie you've told that you never got caught for?
What's the most awkward text you've ever sent to the wrong person?
What's a nickname you hate being called?
What's the pettiest reason you've ever been mad at a friend?
What app do you spend the most time on and are you embarrassed about it?
What's the last thing you cried about?
Who in this room would you want to be stuck in an elevator with?
What's the most trouble you've gotten into at school?
dare: Let the group go through your camera roll for 15 seconds.
Text your last contact 'guess what' and show the reply.
Do your best impression of someone in this room until they guess who.
Post a chosen-by-the-group emoji as your story for 10 minutes.
Let someone else send one text from your phone.
Sing the chorus of your most-played song right now.
Try to make the person to your left laugh without touching them.
Do your best red carpet walk across the room.
Reveal your phone's screen time for today.
Talk in an accent of the group's choosing for two rounds.

truth: What's the boldest thing you've done to get someone's attention?
What's a green flag that instantly makes you interested in someone?
What's the most embarrassing thing that's happened to you on a date?
Who here would you trust to plan your birthday, no questions asked?
What's a habit of yours that a partner would need to accept fast?
What's the last white lie you told someone in this room?
What's a compliment you received that you still think about?
What's your most irrational fear?
What's a text you've drafted but never sent?
What's the most impulsive decision you've made this year?
dare: Give a genuine, specific compliment to the person on your left.
Let the group pick your caption for your next social post.
Do your best pickup line on the person across from you.
Reenact how you'd greet a celebrity crush walking in right now.
Show the group the last photo in your camera roll.
Let the group rename your contact for someone, and keep it that way till tomorrow.
Do a 30-second stand-up bit about someone in this room, gently.
Call a friend and tell them, deadpan, that you love them.
Swap seats and mannerisms with someone for one full round.
Let the group choose your drink order next time you're out.

truth: Who in this room would you swipe right on, no hesitation?
What's the most scandalous rumor you've heard about yourself?
What's a red flag you've ignored because someone was attractive?
What's the boldest DM you've ever sent or received?
What's the most spontaneous thing you've done for someone you liked?
Who was your most regrettable crush and why?
What's a confession you've never said out loud in this room?
What's the closest you've come to a public embarrassment over a crush?
What's a 'type' you keep going back to, even knowing better?
What's the boldest compliment you wish someone here would give you?
dare: Give your honest first impression of the person to your right.
Let the group pick who you have to compliment like you're flirting.
Whisper one nice, slightly bold thing to the person next to you.
Do your best slow-motion 'dramatic entrance' across the room.
Let the group choose your next profile picture from your camera roll.
Hold eye contact with the person across from you for 30 seconds, no laughing.
Reenact a rom-com confession scene with anyone in the room.
Let the group caption a photo of you and post it (with your OK).
Answer the next three questions only in a flirty tone.
Give a toast as if this were the best party of your life.
